items.prompt: Lofi hip-hop drum loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor key context. Straight four-on-the-floor kick on every beat with closed hi-hat 8th notes throughout, snare on beats 2 and 4. Bars 1 through 6 keep this exact pattern locked. Bar 7 adds a single ghost snare and one open hi-hat. Bar 8 is a turnaround drum fill: a tom roll across beats 3 and 4 leading back to a strong kick on bar 1. No silent bars — continuous percussion across all 8 bars. Mono kick, slightly stereo hats. Warm, slightly tape-saturated, dusty lofi mix. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Lofi boom-bap drum loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor key context. Kick on beat 1 of every bar with one syncopated kick on the and-of-3, brushed snare on beats 2 and 4, sparse closed hi-hat 8ths. Bars 1 through 6 are the same locked groove. Bar 7 adds a brushed-snare ghost note. Bar 8 is a brush-fill turnaround across beats 3 and 4 leading into a strong bar-1 kick. Continuous percussion across all 8 bars. Mono low end, slightly stereo brushes. Warm, slightly tape-saturated, dusty. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Vintage tape-saturated lofi drum loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor key context. Swung 8th-note groove with kick on beat 1 of every bar, swung snare on beats 2 and 4, swung hi-hat 8ths. Bars 1 through 6 hold the swung pattern. Bar 7 has a small variation with an open hat on the and-of-4. Bar 8 is a tape-flutter drum fill across beats 3 and 4 leading into a clean bar-1 kick. Continuous energy across all 8 bars. Heavy tape saturation, slight wobble, warm dust. Mono low end. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Lofi drum loop with persistent vinyl crackle texture underneath, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor key context. Soft kick on beat 1 of every bar, soft snare on beats 2 and 4, sparse closed hi-hat 8th notes. Continuous vinyl crackle across all 8 bars. Bars 1 through 6 are the same pattern. Bar 7 has a single ghost snare. Bar 8 is a gentle drum fill leading back to a clean bar-1 kick. Continuous percussion + crackle across all 8 bars. Mono low end. Warm, dusty, intimate. Just drums and crackle, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Classic 90s boom-bap lofi drum loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor key context. Swung kick-snare pattern: kick on beat 1 and the and-of-2, snare on beats 2 and 4, swung closed hi-hat 8ths. Bars 1 through 6 lock this groove. Bar 7 has a ghost snare and an open hat. Bar 8 turnaround: snare roll across beat 4 into a hard bar-1 kick. Continuous drumming across all 8 bars. Warm, slightly tape-saturated, dusty MPC feel. Mono low end. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Trap-flavored lofi drum loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor key context. 808-style soft kick on beat 1 of every bar, rolled hi-hats — fast 16th-note hat rolls on beats 2 and 4 — closed hi-hat 8ths elsewhere, soft clap on beats 2 and 4. Bars 1 through 6 are the same locked pattern. Bar 7 adds an extra hat roll on beat 4. Bar 8 is a hat-roll fill across the whole bar leading back to a strong bar-1 kick. Continuous percussion across all 8 bars. Mono 808, slightly stereo hats. Warm, slightly tape-saturated. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Jazz-flavored brushed lofi drum loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor key context. Soft kick on beat 1 of every bar, brushed snare on beats 2 and 4, swung ride cymbal pattern across all bars. Bars 1 through 6 hold the brush groove. Bar 7 adds a ride bell accent. Bar 8 turnaround: brush sweep across beats 3 and 4 leading back to a kick on bar 1. Continuous brushes and ride across all 8 bars. Warm, slightly tape-saturated, intimate jazz kit. Mono low end. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

MPC-bounced lofi drum loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor key context. Slightly off-grid swung kick-snare with kick on beat 1 of every bar, snare on beats 2 and 4, choppy closed hi-hat 8ths with subtle timing humanization. Bars 1 through 6 hold the pattern. Bar 7 has a ghost snare on the and-of-3. Bar 8 is an MPC-bounced drum fill across beats 3 and 4 into a hard bar-1 kick. Continuous percussion across all 8 bars. Warm, dusty, slightly tape-saturated MPC feel. Mono low end. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Lofi sub bass loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Sustained sub-bass holding the root note (C) on beat 1 of every bar with very slow movement — bars 1 to 4 hold C, bars 5 and 6 move to A♭ (♭VI) and B♭ (♭VII) respectively, bar 7 returns to F (iv) and bar 8 walks back to C as a turnaround. Each chord change happens on beat 1. Continuous sustained bass tone across all 8 bars, no silence. Round, warm, slightly tape-saturated sub frequency. Mono. Just sub bass, no drums, no instruments, no melody, no vocals.

Lofi walking bass loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Upright-bass-style quarter-note walking line. Beat 1 of every bar lands on the chord root: bars 1 and 2 root C (i), bar 3 F (iv), bar 4 G (v), bar 5 A♭ (♭VI), bar 6 B♭ (♭VII), bar 7 E♭ (♭III) with a chromatic passing tone, bar 8 walks chromatically C-B-B♭-A back to C on bar 1. Continuous quarter-note walking across all 8 bars. Warm, woody, slightly tape-saturated upright tone. Mono. Just walking bass, no drums, no instruments, no melody, no vocals.

Lofi sine bass loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Round sine-wave bass with slow attack envelope on each note. Root-fifth-root pattern: bars 1 and 2 play C-G-C, bar 3 plays F-C-F, bar 4 plays G-D-G, bars 5 and 6 play A♭-E♭-A♭, bar 7 plays B♭-F-B♭, bar 8 walks back to C with a passing G on the and-of-4. Each note lands on a strong beat with smooth slow envelopes. Continuous bass across all 8 bars. Warm, round, slightly tape-saturated. Mono. Just sine bass, no drums, no instruments, no melody, no vocals.

Lofi muted electric bass loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Palm-muted electric bass playing percussive 16th-note groove led by the chord root on beat 1 of every bar. Bars 1 and 2 root C (i), bar 3 F (iv), bar 4 G (v), bars 5 and 6 A♭ (♭VI), bar 7 B♭ (♭VII), bar 8 a passing-tone walk-up back to C on bar 1. Each bar has muted root on beat 1 plus 16th-note ghost notes filling the bar. Continuous percussive bass across all 8 bars. Warm, slightly tape-saturated. Mono. Just muted bass, no drums, no instruments, no melody, no vocals.

Lofi plucked acoustic bass loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Plucked acoustic bass playing a root + fifth pattern. Bars 1 and 2 alternate C and G, bar 3 alternates F and C, bar 4 alternates G and D, bars 5 and 6 alternate A♭ and E♭, bar 7 alternates B♭ and F, bar 8 walks back chromatically B-B♭-A-C to bar 1. Each bar has a plucked attack on beat 1. Continuous plucking across all 8 bars. Warm, woody, slightly tape-saturated. Mono. Just acoustic bass, no drums, no instruments, no melody, no vocals.

Lofi syncopated funk bass loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Slap-style funk bass with a percussive slap on beat 1 of every bar followed by syncopated 16th-note funk fills. Bars 1 and 2 root on C (i), bar 3 root on F (iv), bar 4 root on G (v), bars 5 and 6 root on A♭ (♭VI), bar 7 root on B♭ (♭VII), bar 8 a syncopated walk-up back to C. Continuous funky bass across all 8 bars. Warm, slightly tape-saturated. Mono. Just funk bass, no drums, no instruments, no melody, no vocals.

Lofi round sub bass loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Round sustained sub-bass with slow envelope movement throughout. Bars 1 and 2 hold root C (i), bar 3 holds F (iv), bar 4 holds G (v), bars 5 and 6 hold A♭ (♭VI), bar 7 holds B♭ (♭VII), bar 8 returns to C with a slow glissando from B♭ down to C on beat 4. Each chord change starts on beat 1. Continuous sustained sub-bass across all 8 bars. Warm, round, slightly tape-saturated. Mono. Just sub bass, no drums, no instruments, no melody, no vocals.

Lofi reese-style detuned bass loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Detuned reese bass with strong attack on beat 1 of every bar then sustained detuned drone for the rest of the bar. Bars 1 and 2 attack on C, bar 3 on F, bar 4 on G, bars 5 and 6 on A♭, bar 7 on B♭, bar 8 attacks on E♭ (♭III) with a passing-tone walk back to C. Continuous bass drone across all 8 bars. Warm, slightly tape-saturated, gently detuned. Mono. Just reese bass, no drums, no instruments, no melody, no vocals.

Lofi Rhodes piano melody loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Antecedent (bars 1 to 4) plays a question motif: a four-note phrase using C, E♭, G, B♭ that rises and pauses on bar 4. Consequent (bars 5 to 8) plays the answer: same rhythm but resolves down the scale ending on C on bar 8. Notes have space between them so vocals can sit on top. Continuous Rhodes notes across all 8 bars (no full silent bars). Slightly stereo Rhodes sound, warm, tape-saturated, dusty. Just Rhodes piano, no drums, no bass, no other instruments, no vocals.

Lofi wind synth pad loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Soft airy wind-like synth pad playing sustained chord progression: bars 1 and 2 Cmin (i), bar 3 Fmin (iv), bar 4 Gmin (v), bars 5 and 6 A♭maj (♭VI), bar 7 B♭maj (♭VII), bar 8 returns to Cmin with a brief E♭ pickup on beat 4. Each chord change starts on beat 1 of its bar. Continuous sustained wind-pad across all 8 bars. Slightly stereo, soft, warm, slightly tape-saturated. Just wind pad, no drums, no bass, no other instruments, no vocals.

Lofi soft synth lead loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Soft warm synth lead playing a simple 4-bar question (bars 1 to 4) using notes G, F, E♭, D, C — a descending question that pauses on bar 4. Bars 5 to 8 answer with a related descending phrase that resolves on C on bar 8. Notes are spaced with rest beats so vocals fit on top. Continuous lead notes across all 8 bars. Slightly stereo, soft, warm, slightly tape-saturated. Just synth lead, no drums, no bass, no other instruments, no vocals.

Lofi felt-muted piano loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Felt-muted upright piano playing a sparse arpeggio — three notes per bar — outlining the chord progression: bars 1 and 2 Cmin arp (C-E♭-G), bar 3 Fmin arp (F-A♭-C), bar 4 Gmin arp (G-B♭-D), bars 5 and 6 A♭maj arp (A♭-C-E♭), bar 7 B♭maj arp (B♭-D-F), bar 8 Cmin arp resolving on C on beat 4. Each arp lands on beat 1 with notes on beats 1, 2.5, and 4. Continuous arpeggio across all 8 bars. Slightly stereo, soft, warm, slightly tape-saturated. Just felt piano, no drums, no bass, no other instruments, no vocals.

Lofi bright Wurlitzer/Rhodes melody loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Bright Wurli plays an ascending 4-bar question (bars 1 to 4) using C, E♭, G, B♭, C ascending across bars and pausing on bar 4. Bars 5 to 8 answer with a descending response that resolves on C on bar 8. Notes are spaced so vocals can sit on top. Continuous Wurli notes across all 8 bars. Slightly stereo, bright, warm, slightly tape-saturated. Just Wurli/Rhodes, no drums, no bass, no other instruments, no vocals.

Lofi plucked synth lead loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Plucked synth lead with short pizzicato attacks. Antecedent (bars 1 to 4) plays a question motif on Cmin scale notes — three plucks per bar with a note on beat 1, beat 2.5, and beat 4 — that pauses on bar 4. Consequent (bars 5 to 8) answers with the same rhythm but a contour that resolves on C on bar 8. Notes are spaced for vocals on top. Continuous plucks across all 8 bars. Slightly stereo, warm, slightly tape-saturated. Just plucked synth, no drums, no bass, no other instruments, no vocals.

Lofi music-box melody loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Bell-like music-box tone plays a simple two-phrase melody. Antecedent (bars 1 to 4): a 4-bar question using only Cmin scale notes C, E♭, G, A♭, B♭ — three soft bell strikes per bar — pausing on bar 4. Consequent (bars 5 to 8) answers with the same rhythm and resolves on C on bar 8. Notes spaced with rests so vocals fit. Continuous bell notes across all 8 bars. Slightly stereo, soft, warm, slightly tape-saturated. Just music box, no drums, no bass, no other instruments, no vocals.

Lofi tenor saxophone loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Soft breathy tenor sax plays a two-phrase melody. Antecedent (bars 1 to 4): a 4-bar question using Cmin scale (C, D, E♭, F, G, A♭, B♭) with sustained notes that pause on bar 4. Consequent (bars 5 to 8) answers with a related descending phrase resolving on C on bar 8. Notes are sustained but with breathing space so vocals can sit on top. Continuous sax across all 8 bars. Slightly stereo, breathy, warm, slightly tape-saturated. Just tenor sax, no drums, no bass, no other instruments, no vocals.

Lofi sustained vocal pad loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Soft breathy female vocal humming a sustained 'ooh' and 'ahh' on a Cmin chord across all 8 bars — wordless, no syllables, no recognizable phrase, no narrative. Bars 1 through 8 carry uniform energy with subtle bar-by-bar evolution (gentle dynamic swells) but no peak, no climax, no silence. Position-agnostic: every bar can be entered from any phrase position. Slightly tape-saturated, warm, intimate, centered. Just sustained vocals, no drums, no instruments, no bass, no other instruments.

Lofi wordless syllabic vocal chop loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Female voice singing wordless syllables (la, da, na) on Cmin scale notes — one repeating short 1-bar motif of two syllables per bar, identical across all 8 bars. No words, no narrative phrase, no climax. Every bar has the same energy and downbeat pattern. Position-agnostic. Slightly tape-saturated, warm, intimate, centered. Just vocal chops, no drums, no instruments, no bass, no other instruments.

Lofi whispered vocal chop loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Female voice whispering wordless melodic chops on Cmin scale — one short whispered syllable (mm, sh, hh, na) per beat, no recognizable words. Repeats a 1-bar motif identically across all 8 bars so every bar carries the same energy. Position-agnostic — no phrase structure, no climax. Slightly tape-saturated, warm, intimate, centered. Just whispered chops, no drums, no instruments, no bass, no other instruments.

Lofi reversed-air vocal texture loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Continuous backwards vocal swells — wordless reversed vowel sounds layered into a sustained airy texture across all 8 bars with uniform energy throughout. No silent bars, no peaks, no phrase structure, no climax. Treat as ambient reversed-air vocal pad, not a phrase. Position-agnostic — every bar is equivalent. Slightly tape-saturated, dreamy, warm, centered. Just reversed vocal swells, no drums, no instruments, no bass, no other instruments.

Lofi doo-wop vocal chop loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Female voice singing the wordless syllables 'doo wop doo wop' as a 1-bar motif that repeats identically across all 8 bars — every bar has the same energy and the same downbeat 'doo' on beat 1. No lyrical phrase, no narrative, no climax. Position-agnostic. Slightly tape-saturated, warm, soulful, centered. Just doo-wop syllables, no drums, no instruments, no bass, no other instruments.

Lofi spoken-rhythm vocal chop loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Female voice in wordless spoken-rhythm chops — short percussive vocal syllables (mm, na, dah, ya) following a 1-bar motif that repeats identically across all 8 bars. No recognizable words, no narrative phrase, no story. Every bar carries equal energy and the same downbeat. Position-agnostic. Slightly tape-saturated, intimate, dusty, centered. Just spoken vocal chops, no drums, no instruments, no bass, no other instruments.

Lofi sustained choir pad loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Sustained female and male choir voices on a held 'aah' on a Cmin chord — slowly evolving sustained texture with uniform energy across all 8 bars. No peak, no climax, no phrase, no silent bars, no rhythmic pulse. Position-agnostic — every bar is equivalent. Slightly tape-saturated, warm, dreamy, centered. Just sustained choir, no drums, no instruments, no bass, no other instruments.

Lofi pitched vocal chop loop, 84 BPM, 8 bars, in C minor (Cmin natural). Female voice singing single 'aa' syllable repeats on Cmin scale notes — same syllable every beat, attack on each downbeat, no words. Repeats a 1-bar motif identically across all 8 bars so every bar has the same energy and the same downbeat attack. No phrase structure, no narrative, no climax. Position-agnostic. Slightly tape-saturated, soulful, dusty, centered. Just pitched vocal chops, no drums, no instruments, no bass, no other instruments.
